verses.latin_vulgate: Audite verbum quod locutus est Dominus super vos, filii Israël,  super omnem cognationem quam eduxi de terra Ægypti, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְע֞וּ אֶת־הַדָּבָ֣ר הַזֶּ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבֶּ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה עֲלֵיכֶ֖ם בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל עַ֚ל כׇּל־הַמִּשְׁפָּחָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֧ר הֶעֱלֵ֛יתִי מֵאֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרַ֖יִם לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: Hear this word that the Lord hath spoken against you, O children of Israel, against the whole family which I brought up from the land of Egypt, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Tantummodo vos cognovi ex omnibus cognationibus terræ ;  idcirco visitabo super vos omnes iniquitates vestras.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֚ק אֶתְכֶ֣ם יָדַ֔עְתִּי מִכֹּ֖ל מִשְׁפְּח֣וֹת הָאֲדָמָ֑ה עַל־כֵּן֙ אֶפְקֹ֣ד עֲלֵיכֶ֔ם אֵ֖ת כׇּל־עֲוֺנֹתֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: You only have I known of all the families of the earth: therefore I will punish you for all your iniquities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid ambulabunt duo pariter,  nisi convenerit eis ?
verses.king_james: Can two walk together, except they be agreed?

verses.latin_vulgate: numquid rugiet leo in saltu,  nisi habuerit prædam ?  numquid dabit catulus leonis vocem de cubili suo,  nisi aliquid apprehenderit ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲיִשְׁאַ֤ג אַרְיֵה֙ בַּיַּ֔עַר וְטֶ֖רֶף אֵ֣ין ל֑וֹ הֲיִתֵּ֨ן כְּפִ֤יר קוֹלוֹ֙ מִמְּעֹ֣נָת֔וֹ בִּלְתִּ֖י אִם־לָכָֽד׃
verses.king_james: Will a lion roar in the forest, when he hath no prey? will a young lion cry out of his den, if he have taken nothing?

verses.latin_vulgate: numquid cadet avis in laqueum terræ  absque aucupe ?  numquid auferetur laqueus de terra  antequam quid ceperit ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲתִפֹּ֤ל צִפּוֹר֙ עַל־פַּ֣ח הָאָ֔רֶץ וּמוֹקֵ֖שׁ אֵ֣ין לָ֑הּ הֲיַֽעֲלֶה־פַּח֙ מִן־הָ֣אֲדָמָ֔ה וְלָכ֖וֹד לֹ֥א יִלְכּֽוֹד׃
verses.king_james: Can a bird fall in a snare upon the earth, where no gin is for him? shall one take up a snare from the earth, and have taken nothing at all?

verses.latin_vulgate: si clanget tuba in civitate,  et populus non expavescet ?  si erit malum in civitate,  quod Dominus non fecerit ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־יִתָּקַ֤ע שׁוֹפָר֙ בְּעִ֔יר וְעָ֖ם לֹ֣א יֶחֱרָ֑דוּ אִם־תִּֽהְיֶ֤ה רָעָה֙ בְּעִ֔יר וַיהֹוָ֖ה לֹ֥א עָשָֽׂה׃
verses.king_james: Shall a trumpet be blown in the city, and the people not be afraid? shall there be evil in a city, and the Lord hath not done it?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia non facit Dominus Deus verbum,  nisi revelaverit secretum suum ad servos suos prophetas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י לֹ֧א יַעֲשֶׂ֛ה אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִ֖ה דָּבָ֑ר כִּ֚י אִם־גָּלָ֣ה סוֹד֔וֹ אֶל־עֲבָדָ֖יו הַנְּבִיאִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Surely the Lord God will do nothing, but he revealeth his secret unto his servants the prophets.

verses.latin_vulgate: Leo rugiet, quis non timebit ?  Dominus Deus locutus est, quis non prophetabit ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַרְיֵ֥ה שָׁאָ֖ג מִ֣י לֹ֣א יִירָ֑א אֲדֹנָ֤י יֱהֹוִה֙ דִּבֶּ֔ר מִ֖י לֹ֥א יִנָּבֵֽא׃
verses.king_james: The lion hath roared, who will not fear? the Lord God hath spoken, who can but prophesy?

verses.latin_vulgate: Auditum facite in ædibus Azoti,  et in ædibus terræ Ægypti,  et dicite : Congregamini super montes Samariæ,  et videte insanias multas in medio ejus,  et calumniam patientes in penetralibus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְׁמִ֙יעוּ֙ עַל־אַרְמְנ֣וֹת בְּאַשְׁדּ֔וֹד וְעַֽל־אַרְמְנ֖וֹת בְּאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם וְאִמְר֗וּ הֵאָֽסְפוּ֙ עַל־הָרֵ֣י שֹׁמְר֔וֹן וּרְא֞וּ מְהוּמֹ֤ת רַבּוֹת֙ בְּתוֹכָ֔הּ וַעֲשׁוּקִ֖ים בְּקִרְבָּֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: Publish in the palaces at Ashdod, and in the palaces in the land of Egypt, and say, Assemble yourselves upon the mountains of Samaria, and behold the great tumults in the midst thereof, and the oppressed in the midst thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nescierunt facere rectum, dicit Dominus,  thesaurizantes iniquitatem et rapinas in ædibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־יָדְע֥וּ עֲשׂוֹת־נְכֹחָ֖ה נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה הָא֥וֹצְרִ֛ים חָמָ֥ס וָשֹׁ֖ד בְּאַרְמְנוֹתֵיהֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: For they know not to do right, saith the Lord, who store up violence and robbery in their palaces.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Tribulabitur et circuietur terra :  et detrahetur ex te fortitudo tua,  et diripientur ædes tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה צַ֖ר וּסְבִ֣יב הָאָ֑רֶץ וְהוֹרִ֤יד מִמֵּךְ֙ עֻזֵּ֔ךְ וְנָבֹ֖זּוּ אַרְמְנוֹתָֽיִךְ׃
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord God; An adversary there shall be even round about the land; and he shall bring down thy strength from thee, and thy palaces shall be spoiled.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus :  Quomodo si eruat pastor de ore leonis  duo crura, aut extremum auriculæ,  sic eruentur filii Israël, qui habitant in Samaria  in plaga lectuli, et in Damasci grabato.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּה֮ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָה֒ כַּאֲשֶׁר֩ יַצִּ֨יל הָרֹעֶ֜ה מִפִּ֧י הָאֲרִ֛י שְׁתֵּ֥י כְרָעַ֖יִם א֣וֹ בְדַל־אֹ֑זֶן כֵּ֣ן יִנָּצְל֞וּ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל הַיֹּֽשְׁבִים֙ בְּשֹׁ֣מְר֔וֹן בִּפְאַ֥ת מִטָּ֖ה וּבִדְמֶ֥שֶׁק עָֽרֶשׂ׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord; As the shepherd taketh out of the mouth of the lion two legs, or a piece of an ear; so shall the children of Israel be taken out that dwell in Samaria in the corner of a bed, and in Damascus in a couch.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audite, et contestamini in domo Jacob,  dicit Dominus Deus exercituum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְע֥וּ וְהָעִ֖ידוּ בְּבֵ֣ית יַעֲקֹ֑ב נְאֻם־אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י הַצְּבָאֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: Hear ye, and testify in the house of Jacob, saith the Lord God, the God of hosts,

verses.latin_vulgate: quia in die cum visitare cœpero prævaricationes Israël,  super eum visitabo, et super altaria Bethel ;  et amputabuntur cornua altaris, et cadent in terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֗י בְּי֛וֹם פׇּקְדִ֥י פִשְׁעֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל עָלָ֑יו וּפָֽקַדְתִּי֙ עַל־מִזְבְּח֣וֹת בֵּֽית־אֵ֔ל וְנִגְדְּעוּ֙ קַרְנ֣וֹת הַמִּזְבֵּ֔חַ וְנָפְל֖וּ לָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: That in the day that I shall visit the transgressions of Israel upon him I will also visit the altars of Beth–el: and the horns of the altar shall be cut off, and fall to the ground.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et percutiam domum hiemalem cum domo æstiva,  et peribunt domus eburneæ,  et dissipabuntur ædes multæ,  dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִכֵּיתִ֥י בֵית־הַחֹ֖רֶף עַל־בֵּ֣ית הַקָּ֑יִץ וְאָבְד֞וּ בָּתֵּ֣י הַשֵּׁ֗ן וְסָפ֛וּ בָּתִּ֥ים רַבִּ֖ים נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And I will smite the winter house with the summer house; and the houses of ivory shall perish, and the great houses shall have an end, saith the Lord.
